Description: Search bar + filter chips on the NPC roster. Filter by type (Bystander/Goon/Foe/Antagonist), status (Active/Dead), folder. Search by name. Already have the pattern from pin search.

Bulk give items to multiple characters at once. GM opens a modal, picks items from catalog/custom, selects which PCs receive them. Currently GM can only give one item at a time via inventory Give button.
On character load, detect old string[] equipment format and auto-convert to InventoryItem[]. One-time migration per character. Prevents legacy characters from showing empty inventory.

When a player clicks a revealed NPC, show a stripped-down card: name, portrait, type badge, revealed info only. Hide Edit/Delete/GM Notes/skills/RAPID. Currently players see the same editable card as GM.
Each player gets a personal notes field per NPC (stored on npc_relationships). Shows their First Impression result and lets them write notes about the NPC. Only visible to that player.
Design decision: when spending an Insight Die for +CMod, should it be +3 or +2? Currently +3. SRD says +3. Just needs a yes/no from you.

Currently: spend 1 Insight Die to roll 3d6 (keep best 2). If result is bad, you're locked out. Change: after first reroll, if still bad, allow spending a second Insight Die to reroll the remaining die. Requires UI for step-by-step spend.

Player-facing NPC cards show descriptive health instead of exact WP/RP numbers. E.g. Healthy (>75%), Ragged (50-75%), Beaten (25-50%), Dying (<25%). GM still sees exact numbers. Requires player vs GM rendering logic in NpcCard.

Item: Surface Give loot in Assets Objects panel
Description: Mirror the per-item Give controls from ObjectCard into the Assets → Objects sidebar panel. Currently GM must double-click the object token on the map to access loot. This adds Give buttons directly in the sidebar list.

GM can award Character Development Points to PCs during or after sessions. Modal or button that increments CDP on character_states. Log entry in roll_log. Players see CDP tracker go up. May need a CDP spend UI for skill/attribute advancement.
Track what changed on a character over time: skills gained, attributes raised, wounds taken, items acquired. Stored as a journal/changelog. Viewable on character sheet. Useful for long campaigns.

Currently a character can only be in one campaign (campaign_members.character_id is unique per user). Change: allow the same character to join multiple campaigns with separate character_states per campaign. Requires schema changes and UI for picking which character to use.
Allow the current GM to transfer ownership to another campaign member. Updates campaigns.gm_user_id. Needs confirmation flow, permission checks, and handling of GM-only features transferring cleanly.
GM proposes session times, players RSVP. Calendar view or simple date picker. Notifications for upcoming sessions. Could integrate with external calendars. Significant new feature with its own UI.
